title: What Econnex Providers Are Doing Credit Checks?
body:
I’m on the fence with a churn to OVO Energy which closes tonight. Rates are the same but would be doing it for the $200 incentive and the three for free plan. It seems from the application that OVO definitely does a credit check and possibly a hard one which makes me consider whether a hard check to an aspiring churner is worth $200. Especially when bank loans are the best churn.
So who is doing hard checks these days?
